key_points: Law refers to rules made by the government that people must follow
Social justice means fairness and equal treatment for all people in society
Laws protect workers from exploitation and unsafe working conditions
The government makes laws to ensure that companies treat workers fairly
Labour laws ensure minimum wages and safe workplaces for workers
Laws help reduce inequality and protect the rights of weaker sections of society
examples: Minimum wage laws ensure workers receive fair payment
Safety laws require factories to provide safe working conditions
Child labour laws prevent children from working in dangerous jobs
Courts can punish companies that break labour laws
formulas: Worker protection → Labour laws + Safety rules
exam_tips: Write the meaning of law and social justice clearly
Mention examples such as minimum wage and safety laws
Use terms like equality, fairness and protection in answers
